name: FN57 | 暮色森林
descriptionEn: Highly accurate and armor-piercing, the pricy Five-Seven is a slow-loader that compensates with a generous 20-round magazine and forgiving recoil. It has been painted using a forest camouflage hydrographic. The woods can be a dangerous place... never travel alone
descriptionZh: 拥有极高的精准度，能穿透护甲，价格昂贵的 FN57 换弹时间较慢，作为补偿，它具有设计巧妙的 20 发子弹和较低的后坐力。 这把武器使用森林迷彩花纹进行了涂装。 森林也许会是危险之地…… 不宜一人独往
